name: Chocolate Frosting for Easy Bake Ovens
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, mix together the powdered sugar and cocoa powder until well combined.
2. Add the instant non-fat milk to the dry ingredients and stir until smooth.
3. Gradually add the shortening to the mixture, stirring continuously until the frosting reaches a creamy consistency.
4. To use: In another bowl, whisk together 1/3 cup of the frosting with 3/4 teaspoon of water until well combined.
5. Frost your cake or desired treat with the prepared frosting.
